purpose: Governed generation-mode accounting for decode, fanout, verifier repair, VCM runtime, and tool-assisted completion. Speed claims are accepted-output and verifier-success claims, not proposed-token claims.

promotion_rules: baseline only
not a speedup claim
not a learned-generation promotion claim
non_claims: Raw decode runtime is not capability.
Zero-pass output cannot be promoted because it is faster.

promotion_rules: must not reduce task_pass_rate versus baseline on the same suite
must improve useful_solution_per_second or accepted_span_per_second without increasing fallback burden
must preserve candidate integrity and no-cheat counters
non_claims: Semantic prefix guidance is not a public-transfer claim.
Prefix/ranker constraints carry candidate_generation_credit=0 unless independently learned generation proves behavior.

promotion_rules: diagnostic paired-control only
not promotable without verified task pass
must remain no-cheat clean
non_claims: This no-head control is not a production route.
A RED no-candidate report is negative evidence, not a capability claim.

promotion_rules: must improve verified task pass before promotion
candidate coverage lift is diagnostic only until behavior improves
must preserve candidate integrity and no-cheat counters
non_claims: Learned plan-head prefix guidance is not a semantic correctness claim by itself.
Two runtime-loaded wrong-answer candidates do not clear the public-transfer wall.

promotion_rules: not promotable while task_pass_count is zero
heldout LM or semantic-plan loss improvement is not a behavior claim
must preserve independent candidate integrity and no-cheat counters
non_claims: Plan-conditioned body semantic weighting does not render code and grants no candidate-generation credit.
The current decode matched prior two-candidate coverage but did not improve functional task pass.

promotion_rules: not promotable with zero verified learned candidates
richer learned prefix dataflow is diagnostic until it emits executable body candidates
guard hygiene cannot count as learned code generation
non_claims: The richer target mode improved private pretraining loss but did not emit learned candidate rows on this smoke.
The current wall is learned update-token selection after an incompatible INIT_NUMBER plus UPDATE_CALL prefix.

promotion_rules: not promotable while task_pass_count is zero
update-contract guards and weights carry candidate_generation_credit=0
runtime loadability is not semantic correctness
non_claims: This fixes an incoherent numeric UPDATE_CALL-to-method-mutation path and restores verified candidate emission.
The generated candidates still collapse to sum-like loops and do not prove broad transfer behavior.

promotion_rules: not promotable while task_pass_count is zero
semantic-plan-token subspace loss is training evidence, not behavior evidence
must preserve independent candidate integrity and no-cheat counters
non_claims: Restricting semantic-plan loss/eval to SLOT:PLAN_* classes fixed the label-space mismatch and improved heldout plan metrics.
Decode recovered diverse learned plan prefixes, but candidates remained shallow sum/list continuations and did not pass the verifier.

promotion_rules: not promotable while task_pass_count is zero
heldout plan accuracy improvement cannot hide decode coverage regression
must preserve independent candidate integrity and no-cheat counters
non_claims: Guard/condition/finalizer weighting improved heldout semantic-plan accuracy but did not produce verifier-passing bodies.
This checkpoint regressed broad4 learned candidate coverage and introduced repeated shallow body continuations, so it is negative evidence for promotion.

promotion_rules: not promotable while task_pass_count is zero
private replay training evidence does not count as heldout capability evidence
must preserve independent candidate integrity and no-cheat counters
non_claims: Private algorithmic replay improved heldout LM loss and kept candidate integrity clean, but broad4 functional pass remained zero.
Identity-update blocking reduced one shallow failure family but exposed weak operand binding such as max(value)/int(value), not semantic task solving.

promotion_rules: not promotable while task_pass_count is zero
decode-starvation replay is repair pressure only and grants no generation credit
must preserve independent candidate integrity and no-cheat counters
non_claims: Escape replay improved private LM loss again but reduced broad4 completed candidate coverage under the stricter identity guard.
The current wall is learned body continuation and operand/finalizer binding, not semantic-plan classification or candidate loadability.

promotion_rules: not promotable while task_pass_count is zero
statement-slot prefixes are target-side private metadata and grant no renderer or learned-generation credit by themselves
loadable candidate count improvement must convert into verifier pass before any survival-lane promotion
non_claims: Statement-slot pretraining improved heldout LM loss and produced syntax-valid, integrity-clean candidates, but broad4 functional pass remained zero.
Algorithmic private adaptation increased loadable candidate coverage from 4 to 7 rows, but the generated bodies still collapsed to generic loop/update patterns and did not clear semantic behavior.

promotion_rules: not promotable while task_pass_count is zero
private-train replay labels may shape repair pressure but are not heldout capability evidence
pairwise accepted-over-failed preference must improve verifier behavior before survival-lane routing
non_claims: Private-train replay produced 28 runtime-loaded wrong generated candidates and zero verifier-passed self-generated positives.
Action-trace pairwise adaptation improved private LM loss and preserved no-cheat counters, but broad4 remained zero-pass and still showed shallow/incorrect update semantics.
A follow-up simple_return private replay probe also produced zero verifier-passed generated positives and over-routed into WINDOWED_DELTAS-style loop bodies.

promotion_rules: throughput only affects infrastructure routing
candidate quality still requires verifier reports
checkpoint size/load must be reported separately
non_claims: Fanout candidate count is not verifier success.
STS conditioning throughput is not public transfer.

promotion_rules: do not claim native model KV cache parity
scheduler route can use descriptor metadata only
separate semantic cache lifecycle from native model cache
non_claims: This is not vLLM/PagedAttention parity.
This is not MLX/CUDA/Metal KV-cache parity.

promotion_rules: same checkpoint, split, grammar, fanout, verifier, and candidate ordering as the batched candidate
candidate manifest must match byte-for-byte
serves only as the serial control for the canonical route
non_claims: Serial cached-beam behavior is a runtime control, not a separate model implementation.
One private verifier pass is not public transfer or runtime-serving readiness.

promotion_rules: same checkpoint, split, grammar, fanout, verifier, and candidate ordering as serial control
exact candidate-manifest parity and zero integrity mismatches
private verifier behavior and useful verified output rate must not regress
standard_causal_transformer_survival_gate must independently recompute the adoption decision
non_claims: Beam batching is a runtime optimization, not learned capability.
The measured private speedup does not establish public transfer, CUDA parity, or production serving readiness.

promotion_rules: must compare to baseline on same private suite
must record draft acceptance rate separately from task success
must not hide verifier regressions behind token throughput
non_claims: No speculative speedup is claimed yet.

promotion_rules: not promotable while task_pass_count is zero
source-conditioned semantic slot heads may guide prefix tokens but grant no renderer/template/tool credit
slot and plan accuracy improvements must convert into verifier-passing body behavior before survival-lane routing
non_claims: Plan-only decode on the same checkpoint starved with zero emitted candidates, while plan-plus-slot decode emitted loadable candidates.
The full smoke improved heldout source-contrastive gap, semantic-plan accuracy, and semantic-slot accuracy, and emitted seven integrity-clean runtime-loaded candidates on broad4.
A stronger private body-expression adaptation lowered heldout LM loss but did not improve broad4 functional pass and reduced completed candidate coverage.

Functional pass remained zero; generated bodies still collapse to generic accumulator loops or malformed nested branch/update continuations, so the current wall is prompt-conditioned semantic expression/body choice.

The strict_full_body_semantic_construction_v1 profile now composes source-contrastive, semantic-plan, semantic-slot, loop-update, expression-synthesis, plan-conditioned body, update-contract, return-expression, and primary-dataflow losses without renderer/template/tool credit. It passes GREEN on the semantic-slot checkpoint, but the first follow-up broad4 decode scored 0/4 with no accepted strict candidate rows.

The body-transition guard follow-up removed the zero-candidate starvation on the same broad4 slice: 8/8 generated transformer-hybrid candidates are integrity-clean, 0/4 tasks starve, and verifier labels attach. This remains negative capability evidence because behavior is still 0/4, nontrivial-return rate is 0.0, and the remaining mismatches are loop_without_decision_or_state_update plus missing_semantic_update_value.

promotion_rules: not promotable while task_pass_count is zero
semantic slot vocab closure, role-subspace auxiliary loss, and task-blind expression guards do not count as learned body semantics
expression-call, expression-update, and expression-return roles must improve enough to emit completed verifier-loaded candidates before this route can replace the prior slot-head smoke
slot-role accuracy movement is diagnostic only until body-token decode produces verifier-passing candidates under the same no-cheat source contract
non_claims: Expression-intent slots are private/licensed target-side auxiliary labels and grant no renderer/template/tool credit.
The vocab-closure patch eliminated missing semantic-slot labels on the explicit target-mode smoke, but expression-call, expression-update, and expression-return heldout role accuracies remained zero.
The role-prefix subspace/class-balance smoke improved heldout semantic-slot accuracy from 0.094044 to 0.376176, but broad4 decode emitted zero completed candidates.

The larger role-prefix subspace run consumed 606261 private/licensed token positions on MLX GPU, improved heldout LM loss from 8.589429 to 4.621592, and moved expression-update to 2/18 and expression-return to 3/18, but expression-call stayed 0/31 and semantic-slot loss worsened.

The larger broad4 decode emitted six completed candidates with zero verifier passes and zero nontrivial-return rate; candidates still collapse into malformed expression-call/update continuations such as pathological not-runs or builtin/type loop sources.

The stricter unary-not value guard and the optional model-generated expression-slot soft token bias both emitted only two completed candidates on the same broad4 split, with zero verifier passes and zero nontrivial-return rate.
The soft expression-token bias is explicitly decode assistance with candidate_generation_credit=0; it did not improve candidate coverage or correctness and is not a promoted route.

Canonical expression-call slot labeling collapsed the role vocabulary from 635 raw expression-call labels to 32 canonical call families and the total semantic-slot vocabulary from 1472 to 667, improving heldout slot accuracy from 0.081505 to 0.39185 on the smoke; this is auxiliary-label simplification only and grants no renderer/template/tool credit.

Canonical broad4 decode emitted four integrity-clean runtime-loaded transformer/hybrid candidates, but kept task pass at 0/4 and nontrivial-return rate at 0.0; all generated bodies collapsed to the same invalid additive list loop, items = items + value.
The canonical soft expression-token-bias A/B produced the same 0/4 pass and 0.0 nontrivial-return outcome, so token-level call-family bias is not enough to repair body semantics.

The expression-transition target mode inserts stripped TRACE:EXPR_* body markers after SLOT:BODY_START to train statement/expression boundaries without rendering code. The markers are derived only from admitted private/licensed target-body ASTs, are capped by the grammar, stripped before compilation, and grant no learned-generation credit.
The transition smoke improved heldout semantic-slot accuracy from 0.037618 to 0.432602 but starved decode with zero emitted candidates on broad4.

The transition medium rung improved heldout LM loss from 8.246911 to 5.521098 and recovered four integrity-clean runtime-loaded candidates, but pass remained 0/4 and nontrivial-return rate remained 0.0; generated bodies still collapse to items = 0 followed by items = items + value.

The after-body-start source-contrastive span mode compares correct-prompt versus in-batch mismatched-prompt loss only after SLOT:BODY_START, using admitted private/licensed rows. It is training pressure and report evidence only; it does not inspect tests, solutions, public data, or verifier labels.

The body-span contrast smoke moved the heldout source gap from -0.002314 to 0.000391 and semantic-slot accuracy from 0.037618 to 0.438871, but broad4 decode still scored 0/4 with 0.0 nontrivial-return rate and generated values = values + value loops instead of call updates.

The body-span contrast medium rung improved heldout LM loss to 5.49157 and training throughput to 4961.895 token positions/second, but the heldout source gap remained tiny at 0.000345 and broad4 decode still scored 0/4 with items = 0 followed by items = items + value.

The current wall is source-conditioned learned expression-value/call-argument selection, loop update semantics, and body-token transition behavior, not target-vocab closure, guard hygiene, token bias, or auxiliary slot accounting.
